subcodes.first_line: O my God and my Beloved! I draw nigh unto Thee through the sanctified breathings of Thy holiness which have perfumed the horizons... O Lord, O my God, O Kind One, this servant of Thine from the furthermost lands [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: إلهی و محبوبی انی اتقرب اليک بنفحات قدسک التی عطرت الآفاق... پروردگارا يزدانا مهربانا اين بنده تو از اقصی بلاد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for service, @firmness in the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God
